summary: SEC-6.3 major rewrite completed. The curmudgeon correctly identified that our section misidentified the dome's comparison target (9,086 km, not 8,537 km), making our math-error accusation factually incorrect. The rewrite (a) acknowledges the 5.3% arithmetic is correct, (b) pivots to the triple height inconsistency (9,572 vs 9,086 vs 8,537 km), (c) proves 9,086 km is mathematically impossible under the dome's own H(r) curve, (d) adds inline frequency impossibility argument (f_QW(0) = 8.77 Hz > 7.83 Hz), and (e) renames section from "Math Error" to "Height Inconsistency" to eliminate the inaccurate framing. Title change and TLDR updated. Credibility risk resolved — this was rated 5/5 defense survivability by curmudgeon.
